sprint.goal: KE-2 Canonical Action Normalization — design ActionContext contract, build Claude tool-call adapter, normalize policy engine to consume only ActionContext, benchmark 50-100µs. Parallel: fix #1276 hook false-block (non-zero exit on 'allowed by default').
sprint.previousGoal: Reduce false-positive governance denials blocking swarm agents — ACHIEVED (all 4 issues closed: #1209, #1202, #1208, #1139)

senior.title: KE-2 Canonical Action Normalization (ActionContext) — design + implement ActionContext contract, Claude adapter, policy engine normalization, benchmark
senior.note: Critical path for v3.0. Unstarted 7+ days. Sub-tasks: (1) ActionContext type in core/types.ts, (2) Claude tool-call adapter mapping, (3) normalize policy engine, (4) benchmark ≤100µs p50. Key files: packages/kernel/src/aab.ts, packages/core/src/types.ts, packages/adapters/src/claude-code.ts.

copilot-cli.title: Fix hook exits non-zero with 'allowed by default' — blocking GitHub writes after first call in session
copilot-cli.note: Hook emits 'allowed by default | (attempt 1/3)' with non-zero exit. Claude Code treats non-zero PreToolUse as block. First write OK; subsequent writes blocked. Investigate claude-hook-wrapper.sh and apps/cli/src/commands/claude-hook.ts state logic.

completedIssues.note: persona.env operational exemption in no-governance-self-modification invariant
MCP prefix match: AAB normalizeIntent now uses startsWith() for mcp.call target.
stripHeredocBody() isolates command header before invariant scan. 9 tests (+12 invariants total with surrounding work).
stripCommandWrappers() strips rtk/time/timeout prefixes before git/github detection in aab.ts. 13 tests (+23 kernel total with surrounding work). Addresses Gap A of #1202.
stripSafeSubshells() strips 9 read-only subshell families before destructive scan. 20 tests: unit per family, integration, security (nested subshells NOT stripped). ReDoS-safe [^)(]* patterns.
